visual_description: The man in a light-colored suit looks at his phone displaying a message about a traitor ending a transaction, then raises the device to his ear and speaks. In a separate location, another man in a dark jacket stands by a wall marked with Chinese characters while also holding a phone to his ear. A third man is shown in close-up, listening intently with the phone pressed to his ear.
audio_description: A serious voice is heard speaking into the phone, with occasional static. The sound is low and somewhat muffled.
